Group Support Calls
Maximise Your Membership Experience
DOWNLOAD ZOOM
All call times are stated in US Eastern time (New York). If you're not sure what time the
calls are for you, use a website like World Time Buddy to work it out so you don't miss
the calls.
The next section will talk you through how to subscribe to our calendar feed to keep
track of when the calls are.
Call Schedule and Links to
Review Forms
Please note - you need to request to be reviewed on a call in order to be on the list.
Do this using the links below for the relevant call. At the time of the call, you need to
click the link to join the call - no one will be phoning you directly.
Links to the Facebook group Support call posts can be found under FILES section of
the Facebook group inside a file named FATC Weekly Support Calls.
Beginner Calls
Mondays at 7pm EST
Link to request a review: (note - beginner topics
only) https://goo.gl/forms/0vuo5MsNHi1wUo4G3
Ecommerce Calls
Tuesdays at 7pm EST
Link to request a review - https://goo.gl/forms/7MiQNWRHENQj7jRx1
Lead Gen Calls
Wednesdays at 3pm EST
Link to request a review - https://goo.gl/forms/hIvAONjs2ocfE9Ii2
Bot Troubleshooting Call
Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
Contact Support
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
